summary: ANDROID | Language change - After succesful Lang change previous one is selected in settings, after second change unavailable dialog appears
scenario: After a successful language update via DFU, the settings still show the previous language selection and attempting to change it again displays "Update currently not available" until the app is restarted.
description_clean: After a successful language change, the previous language selection is still displayed in settings. When attempting to change the language again, a dialog saying "Update currently not available" appears. After restarting the app, the correct firmware version is displayed. Steps: 1) Connect device and change language for headset. 2) Go to DFU and wait for successful update. 3) Verify new language selection for headset. 4) Change language to another one.
steps: 1. Connect device and change language for headset.
2. Go to DFU and wait for successful update.
3. Verify new language selection for headset.
expected: After a successful language change, the new language selection should be displayed in settings, and changing to another language should work without errors.
actual: After a successful language change, the previous language selection is still displayed in settings. When attempting to change the language again, a dialog saying "Update currently not available" appears. After restarting the app, the correct firmware version is displayed.
